title: Geo's double doors
description: with this mod, you can spend your time on something else that clicking the second door!
body:
# CURRENTLY IN FIRST STAGES OF RELEASE
expect bugs and failure on heavy lag spikes


## a must-have QOL mod for your world.

Automatic second door opening, perfect for fast-paced minecraft players

## dependencies:
Requires fabric loader 17 or later at current versions

Requires fabricAPI 0.119.3 or later



## github info:
the project is open source, you can find it on the github. if you come across bugs/errors please report it on the github with a detailed explenation, or a part of the log that you think has to do with the problem.
## https://github.com/GeometryLegendX/Double-Doors

## i only make versions and bug fixes on request:
if no one is asking for a new version or everyone is okay with some buggs, i wont bother fixing it, if you want a new version please request it on the github^^
